scheme_name: Vivah Sahayata Yojana (Labor Welfare Board Madhya Pradesh)
page_title: Vivah Sahayata Yojana (Labor Welfare Board Madhya Pradesh)

details: The "Vivah Sahayata Yojana" was launched on 17th September 2021, under the Labor Welfare Board, Government of Madhya Pradesh. Under this scheme, ₹15,000 is provided per case for the marriage of a daughter (above 18 years of age) of workers/employees working in institutions covered under the Madhya Pradesh Labor Welfare Fund Act, 1982, or to a female worker herself.
benefits: ₹15,000/- per case for the marriage of a worker's daughter.
eligibility: The applicant should be working in an industrial establishment covered under the Madhya Pradesh Labour Welfare Fund Act 1982.
The applicant should be employed in the establishment for at least one year.
The applicant should be from an establishment that regularly contributes to the Board.
The applicant should be submitting the application form 15 days before or within 60 days after the wedding.
The bride should be at least 18 years old, and the groom should be at least 21 years old.
The applicant should not have availed marriage assistance under any other scheme.
The applicant should be a daughter of a worker/employee in a covered institution.
The applicant daughter should be above 18 years of age.
The worker or institution should be covered under the Madhya Pradesh Labor Welfare Fund Act, 1982.

offline: Applicant need to download the online fill out
select the district Name and choose the option "
Applicant need to submit the application form with required documents.
After completing the form and uploading the documents, click Submit.
If the applicant disagrees with the cancellation of the application or if the application is not resolved within the given timeframe, they have the right to appeal online.
The first appeal can be made against the order of the designated officer.
It should be submitted to the Assistant Welfare Commissioner, M.P. Labour Welfare Board.
The appeal will be reviewed and resolved within 30 working days.
If dissatisfied with the decision of the first appellate officer, a second appeal can be filed.
This appeal should be presented to the Welfare Commissioner, M.P. Labour Welfare Board for further review and resolution.

faqs.question: What is the Vivah Sahayata Yojana?
faqs.answer: The Vivah Sahayata Yojana is a financial assistance scheme launched by the Madhya Pradesh Labor Welfare Board, providing ₹15,000 for the marriage of a worker’s daughter (above 18 years) or a female worker herself.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for the scheme?
faqs.answer: The applicant must be a worker/employee in an industrial establishment covered under the Madhya Pradesh Labor Welfare Fund Act, 1982, and should have been employed for at least one year.

faqs.question: Can a female worker apply for this scheme for her own marriage?
faqs.answer: Yes, a female worker who is above 18 years of age and employed in a covered institution is eligible to apply.

faqs.question: What is the age requirement for the bride and groom?
faqs.answer: The bride must be at least 18 years old, and the groom must be at least 21 years old.

faqs.question: Can I apply if I have already received marriage assistance from another scheme?
faqs.answer: No, applicants who have availed marriage assistance under any other government scheme are not eligible.

faqs.question: When should I apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: The application must be submitted at least 15 days before the marriage or within 60 days after the marriage.

faqs.question: How can I apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: You can apply online through the official website or visit the nearest Lok Seva Kendra after filling out the application form and attaching the required documents.

faqs.question: Is the scheme applicable for private-sector employees?
faqs.answer: The scheme is applicable only to workers/employees in industrial establishments covered under the Madhya Pradesh Labor Welfare Fund Act, 1982.

faqs.question: How much financial assistance is provided?
faqs.answer: A total of ₹15,000 is provided as financial assistance for each eligible marriage.

faqs.question: How can I track the status of my application?
faqs.answer: You can check the status of your application on the official website under the "Track Application" section.
